title: Lenient Stack Size
description: Increases the stack size of vanilla items
body:
Increases the stack sizes of vanilla items. The new stack sizes are pre-designed and new interactions have been added to deal with the new stack sizes.

Highly recommended to use this in conjunction with a mod or datapack which adds the Bundle recipe - since making these items stackable increases the utility of Bundles.

You can change stack sizes of any items in the config.

**Default Changes**

| Item                 | Vanilla Stack Size | New Stack Size |
|-----------------------|--------------------|----------------|
| Enderpearl            | 16                 | 64             |
| Snowball              | 16                 | 64             |
| Armor Stand           | 16                 | 64             |
| Cake                  | 16                 | 64             |
| Eggs                  | 16                 | 64             |
| Minecarts             | 1                  | 64             |
| Minecarts with blocks | 1                  | 16             |
| Empty bucket          | 16                 | 64             |
| Filled bucket         | 1                  | 16             |
| Potion                | 1                  | 16             |
| Bed                   | 1                  | 64             |
| Signs                 | 16                 | 64             |
| Boats                 | 1                  | 64             |
| Stews                 | 1                  | 16             |
| Discs                 | 1                  | 64             |
| Banners               | 16                 | 64             |
